description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named chatops in the chatops stage that runs for pipeline, trigger and web events and only when the $TASK variable is defined. The job uses a cache keyed by the .ruby-version file, pulls the vendor/ruby directory, and inherits the .with-bundle and .common-ci-tokens templates. It executes the shell commands: source scripts/setup_ssh.sh, source scripts/setup_git.sh, and ./bin/chatops $TASK, and has a timeout of 1 hour. No explicit Docker image is set, so it uses the image defined in the extended templates. Ensure the job is limited to the specified refs and variable condition.
